S. No. Specialty Package code Procedure code Package name Procedure name Rate (₹)

Source: Category C Package Rate sheet — 2,992 procedure lines. Rate reflects selected category (Grade B=1.10×C, A=1.20×C, A1=1.30×C).

S. No. NHISI code Procedure / package name Category Rate (₹)

Source: Specified Illness ESI sheet (52 packages). Rates are fixed and not stratified by category.

S. No. Diagnostic code Diagnostic procedure Rate (₹)

Source: DC Package sheet (85 diagnostic procedures, NHIDS0001–NHIDS0033). Rate shown as “Per marker” for IHC/flow cytometry marker-based procedures.
